name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, delays in payroll tax filings cause penalties. We automate the extraction and compilation instead of manual compilation of payroll tax filings.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, delays in payroll tax filings cause penalties. We automate the extraction and compilation instead of manual compilation of payroll tax filings.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual compilation of payroll tax filings

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, delays in payroll tax filings cause penalties. We automate the extraction and compilation instead of manual compilation of payroll tax filings.
